hero.desc: I build intrusion detection systems, configure enterprise networks under Cisco, and automate security with Python — based in Douala, Cameroon.

about.label: ABOUT
about.intro_title: I am Axel Renaud Tadjounteu Ngongue, a 3rdrd year Computer Science student.
about.intro_p1: Currently in my 3rd year of Computer Science specializing in Systems & Network Security, I design cybersecurity tools, configure enterprise network infrastructures, and develop Python applications — with a rigorous approach oriented towards AWS and Azure cloud environments.
about.intro_p2: My projects cover network intrusion detection, Cisco infrastructure simulation, desktop and mobile application development — each documented and available on GitHub.

skills.label: SKILLS
skills.desc: A skill set covering security, networking, development, and system administration.

categories.cloud: Cloud & DevOps Tools (Azure, AWS, Docker, Linux, Git)

projects.label: PROJECTS
projects.desc: Real-world projects covering cybersecurity, software development, and network administration.
projects.p1_desc: Python/Scapy Intrusion Detection System detecting DoS, ARP spoofing, and port scans in real-time. Generates JSON alerts and an HTML report with attack statistics.
projects.p1_f1: DoS, port scanning, ARP spoofing detection
projects.p2_desc: Complete desktop hospital management application (Python/Tkinter + MySQL): patient records, appointment scheduling, automated billing, and medical statistics.
projects.p3_desc: Desktop management application with MVC architecture, complete management of projects, employees, and budgets.
projects.p4_desc: Complete enterprise network infrastructure simulated in Cisco Packet Tracer: VLAN segmentation, multi-zone OSPF routing, DHCP/DNS services, SSH security, and ACL filtering.
projects.p5_desc: Commercial management application with real-time stock tracking and report generation.
projects.p6_desc: Call center management interface with analytical dashboard and agent tracking.
projects.p7_desc: Mobile application to help local entrepreneurs digitize their daily sales and stock management.
projects.p8_desc: Android mobile note-taking application developed in Kotlin, with Room Database persistence and MVVM architecture.

timeline.label: TIMELINE
timeline.desc: A continuous learning journey, between academic training and recognized professional certifications.
timeline.f1_desc: 3rd Year. Modules: TCP/IP Networks, Cybersecurity & Cryptography, Linux Administration, SQL, Python/Java Programming.

contact.label: CONTACT
contact.desc: Available for a final-year internship (cybersecurity, cloud, or DevOps), technical collaboration, or exchange — 24h response time.
contact.intro_msg: Hello Axel, I am contacting you regarding [your request]. I am available to discuss it at your convenience.
